display_text: Unrelenting Eye, Tier 3 Neutral: Provides the Relentless passive, granting 50% slow resistance. This resistance decreases by 10% for each enemy hero within your attack range. A situational defensive tool that is most effective when you are isolated or separated from enemies. Stats: Max Slow Resistance: 50%, Reduction per Enemy Hero: 10%.
